title: EeveePack
body:
Adding fake mons based on Eevee & Eeveelutions.
~~~~The addon versions will have names:
0.1: Scary Guardian (19.10.2025)
0.2: HE CAN EVOLVE!?!?! (31.10.2025)
0.3: SPLIT EVOLUTION?!?!?! (11.11.2025)
0.4: Eclipse (02.12.2025)
0.5: Frozen Vanes (12.04.2026)
0.6: Scary become Cute (SOON)
1.0: Paradox Eeveelutions! (SOON)
1.1: What is this stone?💧 (SOON)
1.2: There is 2nd one!🔥 (SOON)
1.3: 3rd? How much of them are there?⚡ (SOON)
more will came later.
